summary: Poor‑energy 1986 show with questionable soundboard source and no notable performance highlights
review: Both reviewers lament the 1986 concert, describing it as sloppy and lacking energy—largely attributing the decline to Jerry Garcia’s health at the time. No specific comments on the recording quality are provided, leaving the technical side unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Two low‑star reviews focus on a weak performance; no concrete recording details to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not mention sound clarity, mix, or source type; only general disappointment is expressed.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as low‑energy and possibly affected by health issues, contributing to a lackluster show.
